tasks.label: cpro: Generate Interactive Skin
tasks.command: npx tsx src/cli.ts ue pak generate "./generated-skins/${input:skinName}" --prompt "${input:skinPrompt}" --name "${input:skinName}"

tasks.label: cpro: Inspect PAK file
tasks.command: npx tsx src/cli.ts ue pak inspect "${input:pakPath}"

tasks.label: cpro: Cook PAK
tasks.command: npx tsx src/cli.ts ue pak cook "${input:projectPath}"

tasks.label: cpro: Upload PAK to keyboard
tasks.command: npx tsx src/cli.ts ue pak upload "${input:pakUploadPath}" --slot ${input:slotIndex}

tasks.label: cpro: Open AI Skin Generator (web UI)
cpro: Interactive Preview
tasks.command: npx tsx src/cli.ts ue pak preview --port 7779

inputs.description: Describe the interactive skin effect (what happens when keys are pressed)
inputs.default: Neon plasma shockwave that ripples outward from every keypress

inputs.description: Skin name — no spaces, e.g. PlasmaWave
Path to the .pak file to inspect
Path to the UE 4.27.2 project directory
Path to the .pak file to upload
